title: Co-Founder and Digital Operations Manager
description:
• Design, implementation, and administration of the venture's website, ensuring its availability and optimization for client acquisition.
• Led the customer acquisition and digital advertising strategy, managing the end-to-end cycle of customer service and multi-channel sales.
• Responsible for organizing and prioritizing orders, coordinating the workflow to the manufacturing area to meet delivery deadlines.
• Proactive management of customer claims or doubts, applying practical solutions to problems and maintaining clear and professional communication.
